title: Temperature Control in Guest Rooms and Suites in Commercial
full_text:
5.2.8.3 Temperature Control in Guest Rooms and Suites in Commercial
Temperature Control in Guest Rooms and Suites in Commercial
Temporary Lodgings
1) The space temperature in each guest room and suite in a commercial temporary
lodging shall be controlled so that it is automatically adjusted to a set-back temperature
within 15 min of the space being unoccupied. (See Note A-5.2.8.3.(1).)

sentences.text: The space temperature in each guest room and suite in a commercial temporary lodging shall be controlled so that it is automatically adjusted to a set-back temperature within 15 min of the space being unoccupied. (See Note A-5.2.8.3.(1).)
